revision.text:
{{Sidebar | name = Template:Shinto Talismans | image = {{{image|[[File:Variousomamori.jpg|220px|alt=Two ancient anthropomorphic figures from Peru]]}}}
| class = | wraplinks = <!-- "true" otherwise (default:) omit --> | float = | templatestyles = | child templatestyles = | grandchild templatestyles =
| outertitleclass = | outertitle = {{PAGENAME}}
| topimageclass = | topimage = | topcaption =
| pretitleclass = | pretitle =
| titleclass = | title =
| imageclass = | caption =
| headingclass = | contentclass =
| aboveclass = | above =
| heading1 = Votive talismans designed for the home | heading1class = | content1 = [[Ofuda]], and [[Jingū taima]] when from [[Ise Jingu]] | content1class =
| heading2 = Votive paper slips applied to the gates of shrines | heading2class = | content2 = [[Senjafuda]] | content2class =
| heading3 = Amulets sold at shrines for luck and protection | heading3class = | content3 = [[Omamori]] | content3class =
| heading4 = Wooden plaques representing prayers and wishes | heading4class = | content4 = [[Ema (Shinto)|Ema]] | content4class =
| heading8 = Stamps collected at shrines | content8 = [[Shuin]]
| heading7 = Paper fortunes received by making a small offering | heading7class = | content7 = [[O-mikuji]] | content7class =
<!-- (omitting infinite heading/content parameters) -->
| belowclass = | below = | navbar = }}<noinclude> {{Documentation|content={{collapsible option}} ==See also== * [[:Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Japan sidebar templates]] [[Category:Shinto templates|Shrines]] [[Category:Religious buildings and structures templates]] [[Category:Religion and belief sidebar templates]] [[Category:Buildings and structures sidebar templates]] }}</noinclude>

| heading8 = Stamps collected at shrines | content8 = [[Shuin]]

<!-- (omitting infinite heading/content parameters) -->

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
